objectives.name: Overall System Availability
objectives.description: The proportion of time the trading engine and API are accepting orders and processing market data.

objectives.name: Order Gateway Latency (P99)
objectives.description: The 99th percentile latency from signal generation to order submission, measured at the C++ gateway.

objectives.name: WebSocket Data Feed Latency (P95)
objectives.description: The 95th percentile time between exchange tick generation and arrival in the shared memory queue.

objectives.name: Trading Engine Loop Jitter (P99)
objectives.description: The 99th percentile deviation from the expected 1-second tick processing interval.

objectives.name: Risk Monitor Evaluation Latency (P99)
objectives.description: The 99th percentile time taken by the C++ risk module to compute VaR and check all limits.

objectives.name: API Error Rate
objectives.description: The proportion of API requests (both internal and exchange-facing) that result in errors (HTTP 5xx or exchange error codes).

objectives.name: Data Consistency Check Pass Rate
objectives.description: The percentage of daily reconciliation checks where local trade records exactly match the exchange's official records.

objectives.name: Evolution Safety Rollback Rate
objectives.description: The number of automatic strategy rollbacks triggered per day due to canary or shadow validation failures. A high rate indicates instability in the evolution pipeline.

objectives.name: Cold Storage Archive Success Rate
objectives.description: The percentage of attempted log and data uploads to cloud object storage that complete successfully.

objectives.name: Ghost Validation Completion Rate
objectives.description: The percentage of ghost validation tasks that run to completion within their allocated time window (24h). Premature terminations indicate resource contention.
